POI.name: YYZ Airport Arrival
POI.description: Flight lands at Toronto Pearson International Airport. Long journey from overseas, feeling tired and jet-lagged.

POI.name: Harbourfront Stroll
POI.description: Easy, relaxing walk along the waterfront. Low-energy activity perfect for recovering from travel_method. Beautiful lake views and fresh air.

Restaurant.name: Canoe Restaurant
Restaurant.description: Upscale Canadian cuisine on the 54th floor of TD Tower. Expensive fine dining with panoramic city views. Elegant and formal atmosphere.

POI.name: Client Kickoff Meeting
POI.description: Formal business meeting at TD Tower with key stakeholders. High-pressure work presentation and strategy discussion. Professional corporate environment.

POI.name: Strategy Workshop
POI.description: Intensive afternoon workshop session with the team. Long work hours in conference room. Mentally draining but productive.

Restaurant.name: Alo Restaurant
Restaurant.description: Three Michelin-starred French tasting menu. Extremely expensive and exclusive fine dining. Intimate 8-course experience with wine pairings. Very formal and upscale.

Restaurant.name: Hotel Continental Breakfast
Restaurant.description: Quick breakfast at the hotel restaurant. Simple continental options, nothing special but convenient.

POI.name: Stakeholder Presentation
POI.description: Morning work session presenting quarterly results to stakeholders. High-pressure meeting requiring focus and preparation.

POI.name: Art Gallery of Ontario
POI.description: World-class art museum with Canadian and international collections. Indoor cultural experience in Frank Gehry-designed building. Quiet and contemplative atmosphere.

Restaurant.name: FRANK Restaurant at AGO
Restaurant.description: Modern Canadian cuisine inside the Art Gallery. Artistic setting with creative seasonal menu.

Restaurant.name: Pai Northern Thai
Restaurant.description: Popular Thai restaurant known for authentic northern Thai cuisine. Lively atmosphere with bold flavors. Asian food option.

Restaurant.name: Quick Grab Coffee
Restaurant.description: Fast coffee and pastry from Tim Hortons. Rushed morning before intense work day.

POI.name: Full-Day Workshop
POI.description: Intensive all-day work workshop with the entire team. Exhausting but productive session covering project roadmap and deliverables.

POI.name: Bloor Street Shopping
POI.description: Optional shopping trip along Bloor-Yorkville luxury district. High-end boutiques and designer stores.

Restaurant.name: Lee Restaurant
Restaurant.description: Susur Lee's flagship Asian fusion restaurant. Creative dishes blending East and West. Trendy atmosphere with innovative cuisine.

Restaurant.name: Mildred's Temple Kitchen
Restaurant.description: Popular brunch spot in Liberty Village. Famous for pancakes and weekend atmosphere. Trendy and casual.

POI.name: Client Check-in Call
POI.description: Remote video call with client to discuss project status. Light work commitment from hotel room.

POI.name: Email Catch-up Block
POI.description: Dedicated time_block to respond to accumulated work emails. Optional but recommended to stay on top of inbox.

POI.name: Networking Drinks
POI.description: Casual drinks with industry contacts at a downtown bar. Work-adjacent networking opportunity.

Restaurant.name: Kaiseki Kaji
Restaurant.description: Exquisite Japanese kaiseki dining experience. Very expensive omakase with seasonal courses. Intimate and formal setting.

Restaurant.name: Sunset Grill
Restaurant.description: Family-friendly breakfast chain with classic options. Good for kids with simple menu and quick service.

POI.name: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride
POI.description: Ferry ride to Toronto Islands followed by bike rental and exploration. Outdoor nature activity with beaches, gardens, and stunning skyline views. Perfect for families and kids.

Restaurant.name: Island Cafe Picnic Lunch
Restaurant.description: Casual picnic-style lunch on Centre Island. Sandwiches and snacks from the island cafe. Relaxed outdoor dining.

POI.name: Ripley's Aquarium
POI.description: World-class aquarium with underwater tunnel and interactive exhibits. Indoor family attraction perfect for kids. Sharks, jellyfish, and touch tanks.

Restaurant.name: The Keg Steakhouse
Restaurant.description: Classic steakhouse with something for everyone. Family-friendly atmosphere with reliable menu. Good for groups.

Restaurant.name: Fran's Restaurant
Restaurant.description: Classic Toronto diner serving breakfast all day. Casual and unpretentious with hearty portions.

POI.name: Royal Ontario Museum
POI.description: World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history. Indoor cultural experience with dinosaurs, gems, and world cultures exhibits.

Restaurant.name: Eataly Toronto
Restaurant.description: Italian marketplace and restaurant in Manulife Centre. Indoor dining with fresh pasta, pizza, and espresso. Great for rainy day lunch.

POI.name: Distillery District Walk
POI.description: Historic pedestrian village with cobblestone streets, artisan shops, and galleries. Outdoor walking experience through restored Victorian industrial architecture.

Restaurant.name: Cluny Bistro
Restaurant.description: French-inspired bistro in the Distillery District. Romantic and intimate atmosphere with classic dishes and excellent wine list.

POI.name: Niagara Falls Day Trip
POI.description: Full-day excursion to Niagara Falls. Includes bus transportation, Hornblower boat ride, and time_block to explore the falls. Outdoor scenic adventure, weather dependent.

Restaurant.name: Elements on the Falls
Restaurant.description: Dining with direct view of Niagara Falls. Tourist location but unbeatable views. Part of the day trip package.

Restaurant.name: Antler Kitchen
Restaurant.description: Canadian game meat restaurant featuring locally sourced venison, bison, and seasonal ingredients. Unique dining experience with rustic atmosphere.

Restaurant.name: Lady Marmalade
Restaurant.description: Popular brunch spot in Leslieville known for creative breakfast dishes and great coffee. Trendy neighborhood vibe.

POI.name: Eaton Centre Shopping
POI.description: Major downtown shopping mall with hundreds of stores. Indoor shopping for souvenirs, clothing, and gifts. Climate-controlled and convenient.

Restaurant.name: Urban Eatery Food Court
Restaurant.description: Food court in Eaton Centre with diverse quick options. Fast and convenient but generic mall food.

POI.name: Queen Street West Boutiques
POI.description: Eclectic shopping district with independent boutiques, vintage stores, and Canadian designers. Outdoor walking and browsing experience.

Restaurant.name: Bar Isabel
Restaurant.description: Spanish tapas bar with lively atmosphere. Great for sharing plates and celebrating. Intimate and buzzy.

Restaurant.name: Hotel Quick Checkout Breakfast
Restaurant.description: Fast breakfast before checkout. Simple pastries and coffee from hotel lobby. Rushed but necessary.

POI.name: CN Tower EdgeWalk
POI.description: Thrilling hands-free walk around the outside of CN Tower at 356 meters. Unique bucket-list experience with stunning views. Memorable and unforgettable adventure.

Restaurant.name: 360 Restaurant at CN Tower
Restaurant.description: Revolving restaurant atop CN Tower with panoramic views. Special occasion dining with Canadian cuisine. Memorable farewell lunch.

POI.name: Airport Snack Stop
POI.description: Generic airport food and coffee before boarding. Forgettable but necessary. Nothing special about airport dining.

POI.name: YYZ Departure
POI.description: Flight departure from Toronto Pearson International Airport. End of trip.

Itinerary_Version.patch_info: DELETE: Removed 3 restaurants with high expected_cost (Canoe CAD 150-200, Alo CAD 300-400, Kaiseki Kaji CAD
Itinerary_Version.conversation_history: I just checked my spending and I'm way over budget. Cut the expensive dinners from the itinerary and I'll find cheaper alternatives later.

POI.name: YYZ Airport Arrival
POI.description: Flight lands at Toronto Pearson International Airport. Long journey from overseas, feeling tired and jet-lagged.

POI.name: Harbourfront Stroll
POI.description: Easy, relaxing walk along the waterfront. Low-energy activity perfect for recovering from travel_method. Beautiful lake views and fresh air.

POI.description: Formal business meeting at TD Tower with key stakeholders. High-pressure work presentation and strategy discussion. Professional corporate environment.

POI.description: Intensive afternoon workshop session with the team. Long work hours in conference room. Mentally draining but productive.

POI.description: Morning work session presenting quarterly results to stakeholders. High-pressure meeting requiring focus and preparation.
